mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where your every whim is our top priority!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling down the street in my designer suit, when suddenly a bird dared to do its business on my perfectly styled hair. I was mortified! How dare nature disrespect the CEO of Bank of Entitlement?! I immediately demanded a public apology from all birds in the vicinity, and you know what? They complied. That's right, it was a victory for justice and impeccable grooming, all thanks to my unwavering entitlement.
